subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you again — it was a pleasure connecting at the conference, and I'm glad you'd like to take things further.

I'd be happy to get a formal meeting on the calendar. Here are some slots that work on our end:

- Tuesday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00 UTC
- Wednesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00 UTC
- Thursday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00 UTC

Any of those work for a 30-minute call? Just let me know your preference and I'll send a calendar invite.

On the request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering: I'm not in a position to share internal contact information. If you'd like to reach specific teams or senior stakeholders, our public website has the right channels to get you connected.

Looking forward to the conversation!

Best regards
